name: Mole Poblano (for Poultry, Pork or Beef)
recipeInstructions:
1. Devein and seed the chiles.
2. Cut the plantain into 1/4" thick slices.
3. Heat a wide skillet (or wok).
- Add 1/4" of oil to the hot pan.
4. Fry all the ingredients in batches, placing them all in a common bowl and mixing them after they are cooked.
5. Puree the mixture in a blender, adding chicken stock as needed to adjust the consistency to a fairly thick, smooth sauce just thin enough to blend.
6. Cook over a very low flame (or in a slow cooker) until the sauce becomes a dark, reddish brown (about 2 hours).
7. Serve over chicken (chicken mole), turkey (turkey mole), pork or sirloin tips, accompanied by Mexican rice and corn tortillas (or Mexican rolls).
